scripts.build: SDK=$(xcrun --sdk iphoneos --show-sdk-path) && mkdir -p ios/.swift-module-cache && xcrun swiftc -typecheck -sdk "$SDK" -target arm64-apple-ios16.0 -module-cache-path ios/.swift-module-cache $(find ios/ReToDoScheduler -name '*.swift' -print | sort)
scripts.lint: SDK=$(xcrun --sdk iphoneos --show-sdk-path) && mkdir -p ios/.swift-module-cache && xcrun swiftc -typecheck -sdk "$SDK" -target arm64-apple-ios16.0 -module-cache-path ios/.swift-module-cache $(find ios/ReToDoScheduler -name '*.swift' -print | sort)
scripts.xcode:build: xcodebuild -project ios/ReToDoScheduler.xcodeproj -scheme ReToDoScheduler -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath ios/build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
